members.name: GetVoiceCutoffHz
members.summary: Returns the frequency threshold of a given [param voice_idx]'s low-pass filter in Hz. Frequencies above this value are removed from the voice.

members.name: GetVoiceDelayMs
members.summary: Returns the delay of a given [param voice_idx] in milliseconds, compared to the original audio.

members.name: GetVoiceDepthMs
members.summary: Returns the depth of a given [param voice_idx]'s low-frequency oscillator in milliseconds.

members.name: GetVoiceLevelDb
members.summary: Returns the gain of a given [param voice_idx] in dB.

members.name: GetVoicePan
members.summary: Returns the pan position of a given [param voice_idx]. Negative values mean the left channel, positive mean the right.

members.name: GetVoiceRateHz
members.summary: Returns the rate of a given [param voice_idx]'s low-frequency oscillator in Hz.

members.name: SetVoiceCutoffHz
members.signature: public void SetVoiceCutoffHz(int voiceIdx, float cutoffHz)
members.summary: Sets the frequency threshold of a given [param voice_idx]'s low-pass filter in Hz. Frequencies above [param cutoff_hz] are removed from [param voice_idx]. Value can range from 1 to 20500.

members.name: SetVoiceDelayMs
members.signature: public void SetVoiceDelayMs(int voiceIdx, float delayMs)
members.summary: Sets the delay of a given [param voice_idx] in milliseconds, compared to the original audio. Value can range from 0 to 50.

members.name: SetVoiceDepthMs
members.signature: public void SetVoiceDepthMs(int voiceIdx, float depthMs)
members.summary: Sets the depth of a given [param voice_idx]'s low-frequency oscillator in milliseconds. Value can range from 0 to 20.

members.name: SetVoiceLevelDb
members.signature: public void SetVoiceLevelDb(int voiceIdx, float levelDb)
members.summary: Sets the gain of a given [param voice_idx] in dB. Value can range from -60 to 24.

members.name: SetVoicePan
members.signature: public void SetVoicePan(int voiceIdx, float pan)
members.summary: Sets the pan position of a given [param voice_idx]. Negative values pan the sound to the left, positive pan to the right. Value can range from -1 to 1.

members.name: SetVoiceRateHz
members.signature: public void SetVoiceRateHz(int voiceIdx, float rateHz)
members.summary: Sets the rate of a given [param voice_idx]'s low-frequency oscillator in Hz. Value can range from 0.1 to 20.

members.name: Dry
members.summary: The volume ratio of the original audio. Value can range from 0 to 1.

members.name: VoiceCount
members.summary: The number of voices in the effect. Value can range from 1 to 4.

members.name: Wet
members.summary: The volume ratio of all voices. Value can range from 0 to 1.

rawMembers.summary: The gain of the voice in dB.

rawMembers.summary: The pan position of the voice.

rawMembers.name: voice/1/rate_hz
rawMembers.summary: The rate of the voice's low-frequency oscillator in Hz.
